name: @milady/plugin-bnb-identity
description: ERC-8004 on-chain agent identity plugin for Milady — registers Milady on BNB Chain and keeps her agentURI in sync

BNB_PRIVATE_KEY.description: Hex private key for the wallet that will own Milady's ERC-8004 agent NFT. Required for registration and URI updates. Read-only actions (resolve) work without it.

BNB_NETWORK.description: Target network: 'bsc' (mainnet) or 'bsc-testnet'. Defaults to bsc-testnet for safety.

BNB_AGENT_URI_BASE.description: Base URL where Milady's agentURI metadata JSON will be hosted (e.g. https://milady-ai.github.io/milady). The plugin appends /agent-metadata.json. If omitted, a data: URI is used instead.

MILADY_GATEWAY_PORT.description: Gateway port so the plugin can advertise the correct MCP endpoint in agentURI. Defaults to 18789.

BAP578_CONTRACT_ADDRESS.description: Deployed BAP-578 NFA contract address on BNB Chain. Required to mint or query NFA tokens.
